title: Snakes and Ladders

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1: switch-accessible spinner or die connect a switch

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Set up a game of Snakes and Ladders or display it on the smartboard for the class.
2. The switch user rolls the die by pressing their switch during the game.
NB: If a spinner or die is not available, search YouTube for “Roll a die”. Use a wired or wireless switch with a switch interface to start and pause the video so it acts like a die being thrown.

tooltipText: Use a switch accessible spinner or die to join in a game of Snakes and Ladders
